description_long: This is a modern mountain bicycle with a matte black frame and bold yellow accents on the tire sidewalls. The frame is robust and angular, featuring a full-suspension design with a rear shock absorber and a front fork suspension, suitable for rough urban or off-road terrain. The handlebars are flat and wide, providing stability and control, and the seat is a standard saddle positioned for an aggressive riding posture. The wheels are thick and knobby, optimized for traction, and the drivetrain is fully enclosed, suggesting a high-performance or electric-assist model. The pedals are flat and metallic, and the bike is equipped with disc brakes for reliable stopping power. There are no visible racks, baskets, or additional accessories, emphasizing a streamlined, performance-oriented build.
description: A matte black, full-suspension mountain bicycle with yellow-accented knobby tires, flat handlebars, and a standard saddle, designed for rugged urban or off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full frame geometry, suspension system, and both wheels with yellow sidewalls clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide flat handlebars, front fork suspension, and the aggressive tread of the front tire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drivetrain enclosure, rear suspension, and the overall streamlined profile of the bicycle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the handlebars and pedals.
